Design Decisions
- The base file includes all reusable components (solvers, materials, boundary conditions, geometry definitions, Tasks/Outputs)
- Benchmark and smoke test use XML inclusion (`<File name="./<xml_filename_stripped>"/>`) for clean inheritance
- Interface cylinder geometries use small overlaps (±0.0001–0.0002m) past the vertical bounds to ensure proper node identification by the surface generator
- Coulomb friction coefficient of 0.5 with zero cohesion matches the "imperfect interface" assumption
